documentation.description:
The location of a landing target. See:
https://mavlink.io/en/services/landing_target.html

record_types.name: Landing_Target

fields.name: Time_Usec
fields.description:
Units: [us]
Timestamp (UNIX Epoch time or time since system boot). The receiving
end can infer timestamp format (since 1.1.1970 or since system boot)
by checking for the magnitude of the number.

fields.name: Target_Num
fields.description: The ID of the target if multiple targets are present

fields.name: Frame
fields.description: Coordinate frame used for following fields.

fields.name: Angle_X
fields.description:
Units: [rad]
X-axis angular offset of the target from the center of the image

fields.name: Angle_Y
fields.description:
Units: [rad]
Y-axis angular offset of the target from the center of the image

fields.name: Distance
fields.description:
Units: [m]
Distance to the target from the vehicle

fields.name: Size_X
fields.description:
Units: [rad]
Size of target along x-axis

fields.name: Size_Y
fields.description:
Units: [rad]
Size of target along y-axis

subprograms.name: Check_CRC
subprograms.code:
function Check_CRC
  (Connect : in out MAVLink.V1.Connection)
   return Boolean

documentation.description: Returns True if CRC is valid

subprograms.name: Check_CRC

  (Connect : in out MAVLink.V1.In_Connection)
   return Boolean

documentation.description: Returns True if CRC is valid

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description: Same as Above but does not check CRC

subprograms.name: Decode

documentation.description:
Get the message from the Connect and delete it
from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.

Get the message from the Connect and delete it
from the Connect's buffer. CRC_Valid is set to
True if x25crc is valid for the message.

documentation.description: Put the message in the buffer ready for send
